Name: fintech-enterprise-data-quality-ruleset
Description: Data quality checks for Fintech Enterprise fintech pipeline — enforces referential integrity, value constraints, and business rules

Ruleset.Name: transactions_no_null_card_id
Ruleset.Description: Every transaction must have a card_id

Ruleset.Name: transactions_valid_currency
Ruleset.Description: transaction_currency must be one of the approved currency codes

Ruleset.Name: transactions_no_duplicate_ids
Ruleset.Description: transaction id must be unique across all rows

Ruleset.Name: transactions_card_id_referential_integrity
Ruleset.Description: Every card_id in transactions must exist in the cards table

Ruleset.Name: cards_holder_referential_integrity
Ruleset.Description: Every card_holder_id in cards must exist in users

Ruleset.Name: clearing_settlement_after_transaction
Ruleset.Description: settlement_date must be >= transaction_timestamp (no retroactive settlements)

Ruleset.Name: clearing_no_duplicate_transaction_ids
Ruleset.Description: transaction_id in clearing must be unique

Ruleset.Name: transactions_valid_dr_cr
Ruleset.Description: dr_cr must be either DEBIT or CREDIT

Ruleset.Name: cards_valid_status
Ruleset.Description: card status must be ACTIVE or TERMINATED
